messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：增加一个AI对手。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：增加一个AI对手。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Pong Game with AI</title>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background-color: #000;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu';
        let playerScore = 0;
        let aiScore = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('pongHighScore') || 0;

        // 游戏对象
        const paddleWidth = 80;
        const paddleHeight = 10;
        const paddleSpeed = 5;
        const ballRadius = 8;
        const ballSpeed = 4;

        let playerPaddle = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - paddleWidth / 2,
            y: canvas.height - 30,
            width: paddleWidth,
            height: paddleHeight,
            dx: 0
        };

        let aiPaddle = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - paddleWidth / 2,
            y: 20,
            width: paddleWidth,
            height: paddleHeight,
            dx: 0
        };

        let ball = {
            x: canvas.width / 2,
            y: canvas.height / 2,
            radius: ballRadius,
            dx: ballSpeed,
            dy: ballSpeed
        };

        // 输入处理
        let keys = {};
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (key === ' ' && pressed) {
                if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') {
                    startGame();
                } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                    gameState = 'paused';
                } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                    gameState = 'playing';
                }
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => handleInput(e.key, true));
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => handleInput(e.key, false));

        // 游戏逻辑更新
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // 玩家挡板移动
            playerPaddle.dx = 0;
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a']) playerPaddle.dx = -paddleSpeed;
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) playerPaddle.dx = paddleSpeed;
            playerPaddle.x += playerPaddle.dx;

            // 边界检查
            if (playerPaddle.x < 0) playerPaddle.x = 0;
            if (playerPaddle.x + playerPaddle.width > canvas.width) playerPaddle.x = canvas.width - playerPaddle.width;

            // AI 挡板移动（简单跟踪球）
            let aiTargetX = ball.x - aiPaddle.width / 2;
            let aiDiff = aiTargetX - aiPaddle.x;
            if (Math.abs(aiDiff) > paddleSpeed) {
                aiPaddle.dx = Math.sign(aiDiff) * paddleSpeed * 0.8; // 添加延迟
            } else {
                aiPaddle.dx = aiDiff;
            }
            aiPaddle.x += aiPaddle.dx;

            // AI 边界检查
            if (aiPaddle.x < 0) aiPaddle.x = 0;
            if (aiPaddle.x + aiPaddle.width > canvas.width) aiPaddle.x = canvas.width - aiPaddle.width;

            // 球移动
            ball.x += ball.dx;
            ball.y += ball.dy;

            // 球与墙壁碰撞
            if (ball.x - ball.radius < 0 || ball.x + ball.radius > canvas.width) {
                ball.dx = -ball.dx;
            }

            // 球与挡板碰撞
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < aiPaddle.y + aiPaddle.height &&
                ball.y + ball.radius > aiPaddle.y &&
                ball.x > aiPaddle.x && ball.x < aiPaddle.x + aiPaddle.width) {
                ball.dy = -ball.dy;
                ball.y = aiPaddle.y + aiPaddle.height + ball.radius;
            }

            if (ball.y + ball.radius > playerPaddle.y &&
                ball.y - ball.radius < playerPaddle.y + playerPaddle.height &&
                ball.x > playerPaddle.x && ball.x < playerPaddle.x + playerPaddle.width) {
                ball.dy = -ball.dy;
                ball.y = playerPaddle.y - ball.radius;
            }

            // 得分检查
            if (ball.y - ball.radius < 0) {
                playerScore++;
                resetBall();
            } else if (ball.y + ball.radius > canvas.height) {
                aiScore++;
                resetBall();
            }

            // 更新最高分
            if (playerScore > highScore) {
                highScore = playerScore;
                localStorage.setItem('pongHighScore', highScore);
            }

            // 游戏结束条件（例如，先得 10 分）
            if (playerScore >= 10 || aiScore >= 10) {
                gameState = 'gameover';
            }
        }

        // 游戏渲染
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            ctx.fillStyle = 'linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText(`Player: ${playerScore}`, canvas.width / 2 - 60, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(`${playerScore}`, canvas.width / 2 - 60, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText(`AI: ${aiScore}`, canvas.width / 2 + 60, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(`${aiScore}`, canvas.width / 2 + 60, 30);

            // 绘制挡板
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(playerPaddle.x, playerPaddle.y, playerPaddle.width, playerPaddle.height);
            ctx.fillRect(aiPaddle.x, aiPaddle.y, aiPaddle.width, aiPaddle.height);

            // 绘制球
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.closePath();

            // 绘制游戏状态文本
            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('Pong Game with AI', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);
                ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('Press Space to Start', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);
                ctx.fillText(`High Score: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('Paused', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 20);
                ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('Press Space to Resume', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('Game Over', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);
                ctx.font = '18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText(`Player: ${playerScore} - AI: ${aiScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`High Score: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                ctx.fillText('Press Space to Restart', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
            }
        }

        // 重置球位置
        function resetBall() {
            ball.x = canvas.width / 2;
            ball.y = canvas.height / 2;
            ball.dx = ballSpeed * (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1);
            ball.dy = ballSpeed * (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1);
        }

        // 开始游戏
        function startGame() {
            playerScore = 0;
            aiScore = 0;
            playerPaddle.x = canvas.width / 2 - paddleWidth / 2;
            aiPaddle.x = canvas.width / 2 - paddleWidth / 2;
            resetBall();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }

        // 游戏循环
        let lastTime = 0;
        function gameLoop(timestamp) {
            const deltaTime = timestamp - lastTime;
            lastTime = timestamp;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 初始化
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
